prompt:
Generate a full-body, front-view portrait of character protagonist based on the following description, with a pure white background. The character should be centered in the image, occupying most of the frame. Gazing straight ahead. Standing with arms relaxed at sides. Natural expression.
Features: # 主角视觉描述提示词

A stunning male character in anime style, full-body character design, centered on pure white background.

**Gender**: Male

**Facial Features**: Extraordinarily handsome face with sharp, intelligent features. Piercing eyes with heterochromatic irises - one eye glowing with subtle cyan quantum data streams, the other deep amber, reflecting his ability to perceive temporal anomalies. High cheekbones and a defined jawline. Fair to pale skin tone with a subtle luminescent quality. Expression shows calm analytical intensity mixed with enigmatic charisma - slightly raised eyebrow suggesting constant calculation, with a hint of a knowing smirk.

**Hair**: Medium-length hair in metallic silver-white with holographic blue undertones, styled in a sleek, asymmetrical cut that falls partially over one eye. Some strands appear to shimmer with digital glitch effects, subtly defying gravity as if affected by quantum interference.

**Physique**: Tall, athletic build with perfect proportions, suggesting both intellectual refinement and exceptional physical capability. Confident, commanding posture with arms relaxed at sides or one hand casually adjusting a high-tech device.

**Outfit**: Futuristic tactical outfit combining form and function - a fitted black high-collar coat with geometric cyan circuit patterns running along the edges, made of advanced nano-fabric that appears to shift subtly. Underneath, a dark gray compression suit with embedded holographic interface panels on the forearms. Sleek armored shoulder guards with quantum signature indicators. Utility belt with encrypted data storage modules. Form-fitting tactical pants with reinforced knee sections and integrated biometric sensors. High-tech boots with magnetic soles and energy stabilizers.

**Accessories**: Minimalist neural interface device visible at the temple, glowing softly. Quantum signature scanner attached to wrist. Translucent holographic data screens floating near one hand showing fragmentary timelines and code sequences.

**Style**: Japanese anime aesthetic, vibrant colors with emphasis on cyan, silver, black palette. Clean linework, dynamic shading, sci-fi elements with glowing accents. Character exudes supreme intelligence, charisma, and mysterious authority.

**Composition**: Full-body standing pose, centered, pure white background, no text, no symbols, no words, no letters, no typography., full body, standing pose, arms relaxed at sides, pure white background, character centered, no text, no symbols, no garbled characters, no words
Style: anime
No text, no symbols, no watermark, no garbled characters, no words.

No text, no symbols, no watermark, no garbled characters, no words.

No text, no symbols, no watermark, no garbled characters, no words.
